name: perfectpixel-studio
description: AI-powered animation sprite studio — generate character sprite sheets with 8 directions and 100+ actions from a single text prompt (Wails + Go + React)

name: Educational_RAG_System
description: 面向教育场景的RAG智能问答系统，融合关键词匹配与语义检索双引擎，融合MySQL和RAG技术，先经过MySQL数据库的检索(还融合了Redis辅助储存和搜索)，若无符合条件答案，则进入RAG系统，RAG知识库中的知识储存在Milvus向量数据库中

name: mcp-db-server
description: 🔥 让 AI 直接操刀你的数据库！无状态 MCP 数据库服务，支持 MySQL / PostgreSQL / SQLite / SQL Server / Oracle / H2，连接参数即传即用，零持久化零配置。

name: text-humanizer
description: text-humanizer is an open-source project designed to convert text generated by AI to its "humanized" version. Bypasses the most of AI detectors such as Turnitin or GPTZero

name: foreman
description: A Boris-style agentic orchestrator TUI that supervises headless Claude Code agents through a gated software-delivery pipeline — pointed at any repository.

name: blue-spec
description: 🌊 Blue Spec is a toolkit for Security-Driven Hardening (SDH), a defensive workflow to help AI agents detect what a system does and harden the defenses that matter.

name: Valorant-Aim-Architecture-Overlay
description: Valorant 2026: AI-Powered Crosshair & Cloud DNS Overlay for Next-Gen Esports

name: batchwork
description: Unified batch API for AI providers. Save up to 50% on LLM costs.

name: axon
description: Axon reads the logs your AI coding-agent harnesses already write — Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode — and shows which harness, project, agent, and model is working, how fast, at what cost, and how much code it's producing.
